title: Aegeus' Cottagecore GUI
description: cottagecore-themed gui and hud to get that cozy, nature vibe
body:
# **Aegeus' Cottagecore GUI**

### **ABOUT**
This resource pack changes the user interface into a cozy, and aesthetic cottagecore style. If you like your gui similar to your cottagecore playstyle, this pack will definitely come in handy. Enjoy the cozy vibes!

### **FEATURES**
- Redesigned hud, menus, and containers(inventory, chests, workstations)
- Clean hotbar
- Custom armor, food, and experience interfaces
- Custom menu background

### **COMPATIBILITY**
Works in versions 1.21.x

### **SUPPORT ME**
I have just started making textures and you can support me by downloading this and future uploads. Thank you and enjoy!
